manufacturer_tone_descriptions: PRAVANA’s next evolution of permanent hair color that bridges the gap between permanent creme hair color and direct dye. Use alone, intermix with each other, or with any ChromaSilk Permanent Creme hair color for beautiful, creative options.
Features: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Intermixable with any ChromaSilk Creme hair color.
raw_shade_records.gray_coverage_claim: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Intermixable with any ChromaSilk Creme hair color.
raw_shade_records.mixing_ratio: Use 10V for max deposit or 20V for lighter results (no high-volume developer)
raw_shade_records.special_usage_notes: No need to use with high volume developer. Use 10 volume for maximum deposit or 20 volume for lighter, brighter results. Levels 1 through 5, use 50% VIVIDS Everlasting shade in order to see the tone it contributes. – Levels 6 through 10, use 25% VIVIDS Everlasting shade in order to see the tone it contributes. – For up to 100% gray coverage, use 25% VIVIDS Everlasting + 75% ChromaSilk Permanent Creme Hair Color
data_gaps: Internal SKU 2847 recorded separately

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: VIVIDS Everlasting is PRAVANA’s next evolution of permanent hair color that bridges the gap between permanent creme hair color and direct dye. Use alone, intermix with each other, or with any ChromaSilk Permanent Creme hair color for beautiful, creative options.
Features: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Heavy dye load with multi- dimensional results.
raw_shade_records.gray_coverage_claim: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Heavy dye load with multi- dimensional results.

raw_shade_records.mixing_ratio: Use 10V for max deposit or 20V for lighter results (no high-volume developer)
raw_shade_records.special_usage_notes: No need to use with high volume developer. Use 10 volume for maximum deposit or 20 volume for lighter, brighter results. data_gaps: Internal SKU 2850 recorded separately

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: To pastelize tone with Pastel Potion, combine VIVIDS Everlasting Pastel Potion with other VIVIDS Everlasting, or ChromaSilk Permanent Creme Hair Color Shades. To achieve 1 level lighter use 1 part of target shade to 3 parts Pastel Potion.
Features: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Heavy dye load with multi- dimensional results.
raw_shade_records.mixing_ratio: Use 10V for max deposit or 20V for lighter results (no high-volume developer)
raw_shade_records.special_usage_notes: To pastelize tone with VIVIDS Everlasting Pastel Potion, combine equal parts VIVIDS Everlasting Pastel Potion with other VIVIDS Everlasting or ChromaSilk Permanent Creme Hair Color Shades. No need to use with high volume developer. Use 10 volume for maximum deposit or 20 volume for lighter, brighter results. To use with ChromaSilk Crème Hair Color, mix equal parts VIVIDS Everlasting into ChromaSilk Crème Hair Color to enhance the color.
data_gaps: Internal SKU 2849 recorded separately
